question:
The marked price of a refrigerator is ₹47,500. During off season, it is sold for ₹41,800.
Determine the discount percentage.
एक यफ्रे िजयटे य का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹47,500 वै। ऑप ऴीजन के दॊयान, इऴ े ₹41,800 भ ें फेचा जाता वै। छू ट प्रततलत
ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A person purchased a saree for Rs.7710 after availing a net discount of Rs.1285. The
percentage of discount, the saree shop offers, is.
एक व्यक्ति न े Rs.1285 की जनऱर छू ट जभरन े ऩय ऴाडी Rs.7710 भ ें खयीदी। ऴाडी दकु ानदाय न े ऴाडी ऩय फ्रकतन े
प्रततलात छू ट दी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
What is the maximum percentage discount that a merchant can offer on his marked
price, so that he ends up selling at no profit or loss, if he initially marked his goods up by
28%?
मदद एक व्याऩायी न े लुरुआत भ ें अऩने भार ऩय 28% फढाकय भूल्य अंफ्रकत फ्रकमा वॉ, तॉ भार कॉ फ्रफना फ्रकऴी
राब मा वाजन के फेचने के जरए, ऱव अऩन े द्वाया अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय अतधकतभ फ्रकतन े प्रततलत छू ट दे ऴकता वै?
(ICAR Technician 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A store sells a printer priced at ₹32,000, offering a trade discount of 9%. What is the
discount amount?
एक स्टॉय ₹32,000 की कीभत ऩय एक फ्रप्रिंटय फेचता वै, जजऴभ ें 9% की व्याऩाय छू ट दी जाती वै। छू ट की याजल
फ्रकतनी वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
During sale, Raghav bought a notebook marked for ₹28 at 25% discount and a pen
marked for ₹75 at 16% discount. How much (in ₹) did he save due to sale?
फ्रफक्री के दॊयान, याघऱ न े ₹28 अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऱारी एक नॉटफुक 25% छू ट ऩय औय ₹75 अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऱारा एक
ऩेन 16% छू ट ऩय खयीदा। फ्रफक्री के कायण उऴन े फ्रकतनी (₹ भ)ें फचत की?
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A shopkeeper offers a trade discount of 15% on the marked price of an item. If the marked
price of this product is ₹6500, what is its selling price (in ₹)?
एक दकु ानदाय फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 15% की व्याऩारयक छू ट देता वै। मदद इऴ उत्पाद का अंफ्रकत भूल्य
₹6500 वै, तॉ इऴका फ्रऱक्रम भूल्य (₹ भ)ें ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12TH LEVEL CBT-2 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The marked price of a table is ₹8,980. If the shopkeeper offers a discount of 19%, what is its
selling price (in ₹, to the nearest rupee)?
एक भेज का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹8,980 वै। मदद दकु ानदाय 19% की छू ट देता वै, तॉ इऴका फ्रऱक्रम भल्यू (₹ भ,ें
जनकटतभ रुऩम े तक) फ्रकतना वॉगा?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
After a discount of 34% an article is sold for Rs.3168. What is the marked price (in Rs) of the
article?
34% की छू ट के फाद एक ऱस्त ु कॉ 3168 रू. भ ें फेचा जाता वै। ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भल्यू (रू. भें) क्या वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The SP of an article is Rs8820. If the discount on it is 16%. What would be the SP of the
article (in Rs) if the discount on it is 28%?
फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु का फ्रऱक्रमभल्यू 8820 रु वै। मदद इऴ ऩय छू ट 16% की वै। ज्ञात कीजजम े इऴका फ्रऱक्रमभल्यू फ्रकतना
वॉगा मदद अफ 28% की छू ट दी जाए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A person bought a book at 31% discount on its printed price. If no discount was given, then
he would have to pay `2,480 more. How much did he pay (in ₹) for the book?
एक व्यक्ति न े एक ऩुस्तक कॉ इऴके भुदित भूल्य ऩय 31% की छू ट ऩय खयीदा। मदद छू ट न दी जाती, तॉ उऴ े ₹2,480
अतधक का बुगतान कयना ऩडता। ऩुस्तक के जरए उऴन े फ्रकतना बुगतान (₹ भ)ें फ्रकमा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The cost price of an article is ₹700, and its marked price is ₹1,120. If the seller offers a
discount of 35% on the marked price, what will be his profit percentage?
फ्रकऴी ऱस्त ु का क्रम भूल्य ₹700 वै औय उऴका अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹1,120 वै। मदद फ्रऱक्रे ता अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 35% की छू ट
देता वै, तॉ उऴका राब प्रततलत फ्रकतना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A trader buys an article at 72% of its marked price and sells it at 14% discount on its
marked price. His percentage profit is:
एक व्याऩायी एक ऱस्तु कॉ इऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य के 72% ऩय खयीदता वै औय अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 14% की छू ट देने के
फाद फेच देता वै। उऴका राब प्रततलत भ ें फ्रकतना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The cost price of an article is 64% of the marked price. Calculate the gain percentage
after allowing a discount of 12%.
फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु का क्रम भूल्य ,अंफ्रकत भूल्य का 64% वै। 12% की छू ट देने के फाद राब प्रततलत की गणना कय ें?
Group D 24/08/2022 (Afternoon)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A tradesman marks his goods at 24% above the cost price. He allows his customer a
discount of 13% on the marked price. Find his profit percentage.
एक व्याऩायी अऩने भार ऩय उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 24% अतधक भूल्य अंफ्रकत कयता वै। ऱव ग्रावक कॉ अंफ्रकत भूल्य
ऩय 13% की छू ट देता वै। उऴका राब प्रततलत ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025) `
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
If a shopkeeper hikes the purchasing value of an item by 46% and gives it a discount of
46% on the face value for selling it, then what the total percentage gain or loss will it have
?
मदद एक दकु ानदाय फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु के क्रम भूल्य भ ें 46% की ऱृद्धि कयके भूल्य अंफ्रकत कयता वै औय अंफ्रकत भल्यू ऩय
46% की छू ट देता वै, तॉ उऴ े कु र फ्रकतन े प्रततलत राब मा वाजन वॉगी?
RPF S.I. 05/01/2019 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Sujata marks an article 36% above the cost price and allows a 40% discount on the
marked price. The loss percentage is:
ऴुजाता रागत भूल्य ऴ े 36% ऊऩय एक ऱस्तु कॉ तचह्नित कयती वै औय तचह्नित भूल्य ऩय 40% की छू ट देती वै।
नुकऴान प्रततलत वै:
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Ravi marks his goods 35% above CP but allows 22.22% discount for Cash. Find out his
gain/loss%?
यफ्रऱ फ्रकऴी ऱस्त ु का अंफ्रकत भूल्य उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 35% फढा कय अंफ्रकत कयता वै औय उऴके ऴाथ 22.22% का
छू ट प्रदान कयता वै। उऴका राब/वाजन % ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A retailer buys 75 pencils at the marked price of 60 pencils from a wholesaler. If he sells
these pencils by giving a discount of 6%. What is his profit percentage?
एक खुदया फ्रऱक्रे ता एक थॉक व्याऩायी ऴ े 60 ऩेंजऴर के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 75 ऩेंजऴर खयीदता वै। मदद ऱव इन ऩेंजऴरों
कॉ 6% की छू ट देकय फेचता वै। उऴका राब प्रततलत क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A wholesaler increases the cost price of an item by 90% while marking it. He then offers a
60% discount on this marked price but finds that he incurs a loss. If the wholesaler wants
to achieve no profit and no loss, by what percentage should he change the selling price of
the item? (Rounded to one decimal place.)A
एक थॉक व्याऩायी फ्रकऴी ऱस्त ु का अंफ्रकत भूर्म जनधाारयत कयत े ऴभम उऴके क्रम भूल्य भ ें 90% की ऱृद्धि कयता
वै। फ्रपय ऱव इऴ अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 60% की छू ट देता वै रेफ्रकन ऱव ऩाता वै फ्रक उऴ े घाटा वॉ यवा वै। मदद थॉक व्याऩायी
न तॉ राब प्राप्त कयना औय न वी वाजन चावता वै, तॉ उऴे ऱस्तु के फ्रऱक्रम भल्यू भ ें फ्रकतने प्रततलत का ऩरयऱतान
कयना चारवए? (एक दलभरऱ स्थान तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत कय।ें )
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A piece of furniture is marked at 35% above its cost price. The shopkeeper gives a
discount of 18% on the marked price and still earns ₹1,498 profit. What is the cost price of
the furniture?
एक पनीचय का भूल्य उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 35% अतधक अंफ्रकत वै। दकु ानदाय अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 18% की छू ट देता वै
औय फ्रपय बी ₹1,498 का राब अजजित कयता वै। पनीचय का क्रम भूल्य फ्रकतना वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A shopkeeper lists the price of a fan at 36% above its cost price and offers a 25% discount
on its list price. If he earns a profit of ₹171, then what is the list price (in ₹) of the fan?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऩंख े का भूल्य उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 36% अतधक अंफ्रकत कयता वै तथा इऴके अंफ्रकत भल्यू ऩय
25% की छू ट देता वै। मदद ऱव ₹171 का राब अजजित कयता वै, तॉ ऩंख े का अंफ्रकत भल्यू (₹ भ)ें ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A pair of shoes is sold by a retailer at a 20% discount on the marked price, but the retailer
still makes a 28% profit on the cost price. What is the ratio of the marked price to the cost
price of the shoes?
एक जॉडी जूत े कॉ एक खुदया फ्रऱक्रे ता द्वाया अंफ्रकत भल्यू ऩय 20% की छू ट ऩय फेचा जाता वै, रेफ्रकन खुदया फ्रऱक्रे ता
अबी बी रागत भूल्य ऩय 28% राब अजजित कयता वै। जूत े के अंफ्रकत भूल्य औय रागत भूल्य का अनुऩात क्या वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
By how much above cost price should an article be marked so as to gain 17% even after
allowing a 22% discount?
22% छू ट देन े के फाद बी 17% राब प्राप्त कयन े के जरए फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भूल्य, उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े फ्रकतना
अतधक वॉना चारवए ?
RRB JE 23/05/2019 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A trader offers a discount of 10% on an article if a customer makes the payment in cash.
How much percentage above the cost price should he mark the article to make a profit of
10%? [Give your answer correct to 2 decimal places.]
ग्रावक द्वाया नकद बुगतान फ्रकए जाने की ह्नस्थतत भ,ें एक व्याऩायी फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु ऩय 10% की छू ट प्रदान कयता वै। उऴ
ऱस्तु ऩय 10% का राब प्राप्त कयन े के जरए, उऴ े ऱस्त ु ऩय क्रम भूल्य ऴ े फ्रकतन े प्रततलत अतधक भूल्य अंफ्रकत कयना
चारवए? [अऩना उत्तय दॉ दलभरफ स्थान तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत कीजजए । ]
Group D 17/09/2022 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A shopkeeper marked his goods at X% above their cost price and sold them at a discount
of 16%. If he gained 68% profit, then find the value of X.
एक दकु ानदाय न े अऩने ऴाभान ऩय रागत भूल्य ऴ े X% अतधक भूल्य अंफ्रकत फ्रकमा तथा उऴ े 16% की छू ट ऩय
फेचा। मदद उऴ े 68% का राब रृआ, तॉ X का भान ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A shopkeeper marks an article x% above the cost price and sells it by allowing 30%
discount on the marked price. If there is a loss of 4.8%, then what is the value of x?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऱस्त ु ऩय क्रम भूल्य ऴ े x% अतधक भूल्य अंफ्रकत कयता वै औय अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 30% की छू ट
देकय उऴ े फेचता वै। मदद उऴ े 4.8% की वाजन वॉती वै, तॉ x का भान क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
An article is marked x% (0<x<40) above its cost price. It is sold by giving discount on its
marked price. If there is a profit of 10 , then what is the value of x?
एक ऱस्तु ऩय उऴके रागत भूल्य ऴ े x% (0<x<40) अतधक अंफ्रकत वै। इऴ े इऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय छू ट देकय
फेचा जाता वै। मदद का राब वॉ तॉ x का भान क्या वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The marked price of a radio is Rs 5480. The shopkeeper allows a discount of 11% and still
gains 22 %. If no discount is allowed, then find his gain%.
फ्रकऴी यरे िमॉ का अंफ्रकत भल्यू 5480 रुऩम े वै। दकु नदाय इऴ ऩय 11% की छू ट देन े के फाऱजूद 22 % का भनु ापा
कभाता वै। मदद कॉई छू ट नवीं दी जाम े तॉ फ्रकतन े % का भुनापा वॉगा।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A shopkeeper marks the price of an article at ₹5,180. Find the cost price if after allowing a
discount of 31% he still gains 5% on the cost price.
एक दकु ानदाय फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु का भूल्य ₹5,180 अंफ्रकत कयता वै। मदद 31% की छू ट देने के फाद बी उऴ े क्रम भूल्य ऩय
5% का राब प्राप्त वॉता वै, तॉ क्रम भूल्य ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A shopkeeper allows his customers 8% off on the marked price of goods and still gets a
profit of 19.6%. What is the actual cost of an article marked ₹5,200?
एक दकु ानदाय ग्रावकों कॉ ऱस्तुओ ंके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 8% की छू ट देता वै औय फ्रपय बी उऴ े 19.6% का राब प्राप्त
वॉता वै। ₹5,200 अंफ्रकत भल्यू ऱारी ऱस्तु का ऱास्तफ्रऱक/क्रम भूल्य फ्रकतना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A dealer purchased a water cooler for ₹56,000. He allows a discount of 81% on its marked
price and still gains 71%. Find the marked price of the water cooler.
एक व्याऩायी न े ₹56,000 भ ें एक ऱाटय कू रय खयीदा। ऱव इऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 81% की छू ट देता वै औय फ्रपय बी
71% का राब अजजित कयता वै। ऱाटय कू रय का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Harish, a dealer, purchases a microwave oven for ₹11,400. He allows a discount of 32% on
its marked price and still gains 15%. What is the marked price (in ₹) of the microwave
oven? (Round off to the nearest ₹)
वयील नाभक एक िीरय ₹11,400 भ ें एक भाइक्रॉऱेऱ ओऱन खयीदता वै। ऱव इऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 32% की छू ट
देता वै औय फ्रपय बी 15% का राब अजजित कयता वै। भाइक्रॉऱेऱ ओऱन का अंफ्रकत भूल्य (₹ भ,ें जनकटतभ ₹ तक
ऩूणाांफ्रकत) फ्रकतना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A shopkeeper allows 18% discount on the marked price of an article and still makes a
profit of 23%. If he gains Rs18.40 on the sale of the article, then what is the marked price of
the article?
एक दकु ानदाय फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 18% की छू ट देता वै, ऩयतं ु फ्रपय बी 23% का राब अजजित कयता वै।
मदद ऱव ऱस्तु की फ्रफक्री ऩय Rs.18.40 राब प्राप्त कयता वै, तॉ ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भूल्य क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
After allowing a 16 % discount on the market price of an article, a dealer makes a profit of
40%. marked price of article is how much rupees more than its cost price , if the cost
price of the article is Rs. 8000?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय % की छू ट देने के ऩलचात बी 40 % का राब अजजित कयता वै।
मदद ऱस्तु का कम भूल्य 8000 रूऩम े वै, तॉ उऴका अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऱस्त ु के क्रम भूल्य ऴ े फ्रकतन े रुऩम े अतधक वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A shopkeeper fixes the marked price of an item 90% above its cost price. What
percentage of discount on marked price should be allowed to gain 71%?
एक दकु ानदाय फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भूल्य उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 90% अतधक जनधाारयत कयता वै। 71% का राब
प्राप्त कयन े के जरए अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय फ्रकतन े प्रततलत की छू ट दी जानी चारवए?
(RRB NTPC 12TH LEVEL CBT-2 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The marked price of a bed is ₹744, which is 31% above the cost price. If the profit
percentage is 9%. Find the discount percentage. (rounded off to two decimal places)
एक फेि का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹744 वै, जॉ रागत भूल्य ऴ े 31% अतधक वै। मदद राब प्रततलत 9% वै। छू ट प्रततलत
(दलभरऱ के दॉ स्थानों तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत) ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A shopkeeper lists the price of a fan at 22% above its cost price and offers a 15% discount
on its list price. What is the cost price (in ₹) of the fan if he sells it at ₹5,185?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऩंख े का भूल्य उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 22% अतधक अंफ्रकत कयता वै औय उऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय
15% की छू ट देता वै। मदद ऱव ऩंख े कॉ ₹5,185 भ ें फेचता वै, तॉ उऴका क्रम भूल्य (₹ भ)ें फ्रकतना वै?
(RRB TECHNICIAN GRADE-3 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A trader sells an item for Rs 805 after offering a discount of 12.5% on its marked price. Had
he not offered the discount, he would have earned a profit of 15%. What is the cost price (in
Rs) of the item?
एक व्याऩायी एक ऱस्तु कॉ उऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 12.5% की छू ट देन े के फाद 805 रुऩम े भ ें फेचता वै। मदद उऴने
छू ट की ऩेलकल नवीं की वॉती, तॉ उऴ े 15% का राब वॉता। ऱस्तु का रागत भूल्य (रुऩम े भ)ें क्या वै?
(SSC GD 2021)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
After giving a discount of Rs108 on an article a shopkeeper gains 14%. If this discount is not
allowed then what will be profit % .if CP of article is 450?
108 रुऩम े की छू ट देन े के फाद एक दकु ानदाय 14% का राब कभाता वै मदद इऴ छू ट की अनभु तत नवी वै तॉ राब %
फ्रकतना वॉगा मदद क्रम भल्यू 450रु वॉ।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
When an article is sold at 5 percent discount, then there is a profit of 14 percent. If the
disocount is 11 percent, then what will be the profit?
जफ एक ऱस्त ु कॉ 5 प्रततलत की छू ट ऩय फेचा जाता वै, तॉ 14 प्रततलत का राब वॉता वै। मदद छू ट 11 प्रततलत वै, तॉ
राब क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A merchant offers a discount of 25% on the list price, due to which she makes a loss of 13%.
What percent profit or percent loss will she make if she sells at a discount of 10% of the list
price?
एक भरवरा व्याऩायी अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 25% की छू ट देती वै, जजऴके कायण उऴ े 13% की वाजन वॉती वै। मदद ऱव
अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 10% की छू ट ऩय फेचती वै, तॉ उऴ े फ्रकतन े प्रततलत राब मा फ्रकतन े प्रततलत वाजन वॉगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
When a shopkeeper allows 36% discount on the retail price of his product, he earns a
profit of 8.8%. Find the discount percentage given by shopkeeper if he intended to earn
34.3% profit by selling same product?
जफ कॉई दकु ानदाय अऩने उत्पाद के खुदया भूल्य ऩय 36% की छू ट देता वै, तॉ ऱव 8.8% का राब अजजित कयता वै।
मदद ऱव उऴी उत्पाद कॉ फेचकय ऱव 34.3% राब अजजित कयना चावता वै, तॉ दकु ानदाय द्वाया ददमा गमा छू ट
प्रततलत क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A shopkeeper gains 20% by selling an article when he gives 30% discount on its marked
price. If the cost price of the article is increased by 20% and he still wants to earn a profit of
12%, then how much discount percent should he give now on the same marked price?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऱस्तु कॉ उऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 30% की छू ट देने ऩय 20% का राब प्राप्त कयता वै। मदद ऱस्तु के
क्रम भूल्य भ ें 20% की ऱृद्धि की जाती वै औय ऱव फ्रपय बी 12% का राब अजजित कयना चावता वै, तॉ उऴ े उऴी अंफ्रकत
भूल्य ऩय अफ फ्रकतना छू ट प्रततलत देना चारवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A dealer marks his goods at 40% above the cost price. He sells 60% of the goods at the
marked price giving 10% discount and the rest by giving 50% discount on the marked
price. What is his overall profit/loss per cent?
कॉई फ्रऱक्रे ता अऩनी ऱस्त ु ऩय क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 40% अतधक अंफ्रकत कयता वै। ऱव 60% ऱस्तु कॉ अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 10%
छू ट देकय फेचता वै औय लळे ऱस्त ु कॉ अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 50% छू ट देकय फेचता वै। उऴका कु र राब/वाजन प्रततलत
ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A man sold an article for ₹360 by first giving a d% discount on its marked price, and then
another discount having the same nominal value (in ₹). If the marked price of the article
is ₹2250, then what is the value of d?
एक ऱ्मक्ति न े एक ऱस्तु कॉ इऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय ऩवरे d% की छू ट औय फ्रपय उतन े वी ऴभभूल्य (₹ भ)ें की एक
औय छू ट देकय ₹360 भ ें फेचा। मदद ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भल्यू ₹2250 वै, तॉ d का भान क्या वै?
[RRB JE 2024]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
Successive discounts of 15% and 7% is equivalent to a single discount of:
15% औय 7% की क्रजभक छू ट, __________ की एकर छू ट के फयाफय वै।
RPF CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two successive discounts of 65% and 24% are equivalent to a single discount of _____.
65% औय 24% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टें, _______ की एकर छू ट के फयाफय वोंगी।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A store offers a discount of 14% on a television marked at ₹78,000. During a sale, an
additional 8% discount is offered on the already discounted price. What is the total
discount percentage?
एक स्टॉय ₹78,000 की कीभत ऱारे टेरीफ्रऱज़न ऩय 14% की छू ट दे यवा वै। ऴेर के दॊयान, ऩवरे ऴ े छू ट ऱारी
कीभत ऩय 8% की अततरयि छू ट दी जाती वै। कु र छू ट प्रततलत ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Two successive discounts of 15% and X% on the sale of an item is equivalent to a single
discount of 23.5%. What is the value of X% ?
फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु की फ्रफक्री ऩय 15% औय X% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट 23.5% की एकर छू ट के फयाफय वै। X% का भूल्य ज्ञात
कीजजए।
Group D 22/09/2022 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
Three successive discounts of 25% each on the marked price of an item are together
equivalent to a single discount (correct up to 2 decimal places) of :
फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 25% प्रत्येक की तीन क्रजभक छू टें, फ्रकऴ एकर छू ट (2 दलभरऱ स्थानों तक ऴवी)
के फयाफय वोंगी?
SSC CGL 2023 PRE
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A shop offers three successive discounts of 10%, 15% and 20% on a product. Find the single
equivalent discount percentage that would result in the same final price.
एक दकु ान फ्रकऴी उत्पाद ऩय 10%, 15% औय 20% की तीन क्रभागत छू ट देती वै। ऱव एकर ऴभतुल्य छू ट प्रततलत
ज्ञात कय ेंजजऴऴ े अंततभ भूल्य ऴभान यवे।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
Find a single discount (rounded up to two decimal places) equal to three consecutive
discounts of 26%, 29% and 2%.
26%, 29% औय 2% की तीन क्रजभक छू टों के फयाफय एकर छू ट (दलभरऱ के दॉ स्थानों तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत) ज्ञात
कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The successive discounts of 24%, 18% and 20% are equivalent to a single discount of:
(Rounded up to two decimal places.)
24%, 18% औय 20% की क्रजभक छू ट, फ्रकऴ एकर छू ट के फयाफय वै? (दलभरऱ के दॉ स्थानों तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Three successive discounts on the marked price of an article turns out to be equivalent to
a single discount of 19%. If the rates of the first and second discount are 10% and 4%
respectively, what is the rate of 3rd discount?
फ्रकऴी ऱस्त ु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय क्रभागत 3 छू ट, 19% की फ्रकऴी एकर छू ट के ऴभतुल्य वै| मदद ऩवरी औय दऴू यी
छू ट की दय ेंक्रभलः 10% औय 4% वै, तॉ तीऴयी छू ट की दय क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A company offers a scheme discount of 'buy 5 get 3 free' offer on shirts. Find the discount
percentage.
एक कं ऩनी लटा ऩय '5 खयीदें 3 भुफ़्त ऩाएं' की छू ट स्कीभ ऑपय कयती वै। छू ट प्रततलत ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
During festivals, a banner on a shop displays, 'Pay for 8 and get 11'. The discount
percentage offered is:
त्यॉवाय के दॊयान, फ्रकऴी दकु ान ऩय रग े फैनय ऩय जरखा था, '8 के जरए बुगतान कय ें औय 11 ऩाएं।' छू ट प्रततलत
ज्ञात कय।ें
(RRB ALP 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A shopkeeper offers a scheme discount of 'Buy goods worth ₹6000 and get ₹1000 worth of
goods free'. What is the effective discount percentage (rounded off to two decimals)?
एक दकु ानदाय '₹6000 का ऴाभान खयीदें औय ₹1000 का ऴाभान भुफ़्त ऩाएं' की स्कीभ छू ट देता वै। प्रबाऱी छू ट
प्रततलत (दॉ दलभरऱ स्थानों तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत) फ्रकतना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Aman offers a discount scheme, such that on buying 12 rough copies, get x rough copies
for free. If the equivalent percentage discount is 25%, then what is the value of x?
अभन, '12 यप कॉऩी खयीदन े ऩय, x यप कॉऩी भुफ्त प्राप्त कय'ें की एक छू ट स्कीभ प्रदान कयता वै। मदद ऴभतुल्य
प्रततलत छू ट 25% वै, तॉ x का भान ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A shop offers 'Buy three for ₹6,000, get one free' for Dasara celebration, and also offers
₹600 cash back if a person pays in cash. What is the total percentage of discount offered
for a customer who pays in cash?
एक दकु ान भ ें दलवया उत्सऱ के दॊयान '₹6,000 भ ें तीन खयीदें, एक भुफ्त ऩाएं' का ऑपय चर यवा वै, औय मदद
कॉई व्यक्ति नकद भ ें बुगतान कयता वै, तॉ उऴ े ₹600 का कै ल-फैक बी ददमा जाता वै। नकद भ ें बुगतान कयन े
ऱारे ग्रावक कॉ ददमा जाने ऱारा कु र छू ट प्रततलत फ्रकतना वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A shopkeeper offers the following three schemes:
एक दकु ानदाय जनम्नजरखखत तीन मॉजनाएँ ऩेल कयता वै:
I. Buy 9 get 1 free/9 खयीदें 1 भुफ्त ऩाएं
II. Buy 7 get 8/7 खयीदॉ 8 ऩाओ
III. Two successive discounts of 20% and 15%/20% औय 15% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट
Which scheme has the lowest discount percentage (all articles have the same marked
price)
फ्रकऴ मॉजना भ ें ऴफऴ े कभ छू ट प्रततलत वै (ऴबी ऱस्तओु ंका अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऴभान वै)
(SSC SELECTION POST XII GRADUATE LEVEL)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A retailer offers the following discount schemes for buyers on an article.
एक खुदया फ्रऱक्रे ता ऱस्तु ऩय खयीदायों के जरए जनम्नजरखखत छू ट स्कीभ ें प्रदान कयता वै।
I. Two successive discounts of 27%./27% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टें।
II. A discount of 36% followed by a discount of 45%./36% की छू ट के फाद 45% की एक छू ट।
III. Successive discounts of 19% and 32%./19% औय 32% की क्रजभक छू टें।
IV. A discount of 34% followed by a discount of 7%./34% की छू ट के फाद 7% की एक छू ट।
Which scheme will fetch the maximum selling price?
फ्रकऴ स्कीभ का फ्रऱक्रम भूल्य अतधकतभ वॉगा?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The difference between a discount of 30% on ₹2,200 and two successive discounts of 25%
and 5% on the same amount is:
₹2,200 ऩय 30% की छू ट तथा उऴी धनयाजल ऩय 25% औय 5% की दॉ क्रभागत छू टों के फीच का अंतय फ्रकतना वै?
(RRB CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
An item marked for ₹38,800 is available on a discount of 25% or two successive discounts
of 10% and 15%. What is the difference between the selling prices in the discount
schemes?
₹38,800 अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऱारी एक ऱस्तु 25% की एकर छू ट ऩय मा 10% औय 15% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टों ऩय उऩरब्ध
वै। इन छू ट मॉजनाओ ंभ ें फ्रऱक्रम भूल्यों के फीच फ्रकतना अंतय वॉगा ?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
On a marked price, the difference between the selling prices with a single discount of 40%
and two successive discounts of 15% and 20% is ₹400, then find the marked price (in ₹).
मदद अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय, 40% की एकर छू ट तथा 15% औय 20% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टों के फ्रऱक्रम भूल्यों का अंतय
₹400 वै, तॉ अंफ्रकत भूल्य (₹ भ)ें ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A shopkeeper marks up the price of an article by 60%. He offers two successive discounts
of 10% and 15% on it. He earns X% profit. What is the value of X?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऱस्तु का भूल्य 60% अतधक अंफ्रकत कयता वै। ऱव इऴ ऩय 10% औय 15% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट
प्रदान कयता वै। ऱव X% राब कभाता वै। X का भूल्य क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A dealer marks an article 40% above its cost price, and sells it by giving two successive
discounts of 15% and 25% on the marked price. If he suffers a loss of Rs. 344, then the cost
price (in Rs.) of the article is:
एक िीरय एक ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भूल्य क्रम भूल्य ऴ े 40% अतधक यखता वै, औय इऴ े अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय दॉ क्रभागत
छू टों 15% औय 25% के ऴाथ फेचता वै। मदद उऴ े ₹344 की वाजन वॉती वै, तॉ ऱस्त ु का क्रम भूल्य (₹ भ)ें क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A shopkeeper sells an item for ₹583.2 after giving two successive discounts of 25% and
40% on its marked price. Had he not given any discount, he would have earned a profit of
62%. What is the cost price (in ₹) of the item?
एक दकु ानदाय एक ऱस्तु कॉ उऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 25% औय 40% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट देने के फाद ₹583.2 भ ें
फेचता वै। मदद उऴन े कॉई छू ट नवीं दी वॉती तॉ उऴ े 62% का राब वॉता। ऱस्त ु का रागत भूल्य (₹ भ)ें क्या वै?
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A product is marked at ₹7,500. Two successive discounts of 8% and 5% are offered. What
is the final selling price?
एक उत्पाद का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹7,500 वै। इऴऩय 8% औय 5% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टें दी जाती वैं। अंततभ फ्रऱक्रम भूल्य
ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The marked price of a fancy toy is ₹30,000. It is to be sold allowing two successive
discounts of 20% and 24%, respectively. On cash payment, an additional 10% discount on
the net price is also given. The selling price (in ₹) of the toy is:
एक पैं ऴी खखरॊने का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹30,000 वै। इऴ े क्रभलः 20% औय 24% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट देत े रृए फेचा
जाना वै। नकद बुगतान ऩय लुि भूल्य ऩय 10% की अततरयि छू ट बी दी जाती वै। खखरॊन े का फ्रऱक्रम भल्यू (₹
भ)ें वै:
(SSC SELECTION POST XII MATRICULATION LEVEL)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A television is marked at ₹50,000. The store offers a 25% discount and an additional 10%
discount on the discounted price. After these discounts, the buyer has to pay 5% GST on
the final price. What is the final amount paid by the buyer?
एक टेरीफ्रऱज़न का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹50,000 वै। स्टॉय 25% की छू ट औय उऴ रयमामती भूल्य (discounted
price) ऩय 10% की अततरयि छू ट देता वै। इन छू टों के फाद, खयीदाय कॉ अंततभ भल्यू ऩय 5% GST देना ऩडता वै।
खयीदाय द्वाया बुगतान की गई अंततभ याजल फ्रकतनी वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The marked price of a vehicle is ₹6,48,200. It is sold after allowing three successive
discounts of 6%, 5% and 4%. Find its selling price. (Rounded off to nearest rupee)
एक ऱावन का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹6,48,200 वै। इऴ े 6%, 5% औय 4% की तीन क्रजभक छू टें देन े के फाद फेचा जाता वै।
इऴका फ्रऱक्रम भूल्य (जनकटतभ रुऩए भ ें ऩूणाांफ्रकत) ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
An article sold for ₹688.16 after two successive discounts of 12% and 8% respectively.
What is its marked price?
12% औय 8% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट के फाद फ्रकऴी ऱस्त ु कॉ ₹688.16 भ ें फेचा जाता वै। इऴका अंफ्रकत भूल्य क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A chair was sold for ₹4,600 after giving two successive discounts of 12% and 9%. What is
the marked price? (Rounded up to two decimal places.)
एक कु ऴी कॉ 12% औय 9% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट देने के फाद ₹4,600 भ ें फेचा गमा। अंफ्रकत भूल्य फ्रकतना वै? (दॉ
दलभरऱ स्थान तक ऩूणाांफ्रकत)
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
If after three successive discounts of 20%, 25% and 35%, an item is sold for ₹33,150, what is
its marked price (in ₹)?
मदद 20%, 25% औय 35% की तीन क्रजभक छू ट के फाद, कॉई ऱस्तु ₹33,150 भ ें फेची जाती वै, तॉ उऴका अंफ्रकत
भूल्य (₹ भ)ें ज्ञात कीजजए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A discount of 20% is given for the purchase of two books by a bookseller and a discount of
25% is offered if a customer buys more than two books. A 10% discount is being offered to all
the customers on purchase of one book. An additional 5% discount will be given to students.
Sohan, a student of M.Com in college, bought a book for Rs 513. What was the marked price
of the book?
एक ऩुस्तक फ्रऱक्रे ता द्वाया दॉ ऩुस्तकों की खयीद ऩय 20% की छू ट दी जाती वै औय मदद ग्रावक दॉ ऴ े अतधक ऩुस्तकें
खयीदता वै तॉ 25% की छू ट दी जाती वै। ऴबी ग्रावकों कॉ एक ऩुस्तक की खयीद ऩय 10 प्रततलत की छू ट दी जा यवी वै।
छात्रों कॉ अततरयि 5% की छू ट दी जाएगी। कॉरेज भ ें एभकॉभ के छात्र ऴॉवन न े 513 रुऩम े भ ें एक फ्रकताफ खयीदी।
फ्रकताफ का अंफ्रकत भूल्य क्या था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A store sells a product with an original price of ₹45,520. Calculate the total amount of
discount provided if 10% trade discount and 5% scheme discount is applied on the
transaction.
फ्रकऴी उत्पाद कॉ एक स्टॉय ऩय ₹45,520 की भूर कीभत ऩय फेचा जाता वै। मदद ऴॊदे ऩय 10% व्याऩाय छू ट औय 5%
स्कीभ छू ट दी जाती वै, तॉ दी गई छू ट की कु र धनयाजल की गणना कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A computer is marked at ₹70,000 and a discount of 16% is offered on it. An additional
discount is offered to students. If a student pays ₹57,036 for the computer, then how
much additional discount percentage did the student receive?
एक कं प्यूटय का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹70,000 वै औय इऴ ऩय 16% की छू ट दी जाती वै। छात्रों कॉ एक अततरयि छू ट दी
जाती वै। मदद एक छात्र कं प्यूटय के जरए ₹57,036 का बुगतान कयता वै, तॉ छात्र कॉ फ्रकतन े प्रततलत अततरयि
छू ट जभरी?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The marked price of a mobile phone was ₹18,500. A man bought the same for ₹13,000 after
getting two successive discounts, the first at 24%. What was the second discount rate
(correct to two places of decimals)?
एक भॉफाइर णॉन का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹18,500 था। एक व्यक्ति न े दॉ क्रजभक छू ट प्राप्त कयन े के फाद उऴी णॉन कॉ
₹13,000 भ ें खयीदा, जजऴभें ऩवरी छू ट 24% थी। दऴू यी छू ट की दय (दलभरऱ के दॉ स्थानों तक ऴवी) फ्रकतनी थी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
An article is listed at `15,000 and the discount is 12%. What additional discount must be
given to bring the net selling price to `12,078?
फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु का ऴूची भूल्य ₹15,000 वै, जजऴ ऩय 12% छू ट दी जाती वै। लुि फ्रऱक्रम भूल्य
₹12,078 कयने के जरए फ्रकतनी अततरयि छू ट दी जानी चारवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
After giving two successive discounts, each of x% on the marked price of an article, the
total discount is ₹18,000. If the marked price of the article is ₹50,000, find the value of x.
एक ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय प्रत्येक x% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टें देने के फाद, कु र छू ट ₹18,000 वै। मदद ऱस्त ु का
अंफ्रकत भूल्य ₹50,000 वै, तॉ x का भान ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
After giving two successive discounts, each of x%, on the marked price of an article, total
discount is Rs 453.60. If the marked price of the article is Rs 1260, then the value of x is:
फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भल्यू ऩय कजभक दॉ छू ट, प्रत्येक x% देन े के फाद कु र छू ट 453.60 रुऩम े वै। मदद ऱस्तु का
अंफ्रकत भूल्य 1260 रुऩम े वै। तॉ X का भान वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A trader sells an item by giving two successive discounts of 5% and 20% on its marked
price and still gains 33%. By how much percentage above the cost price does he mark the
item?
एक व्याऩायी एक ऱस्तु कॉ उऴके अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 5% औय 20% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट देकय फेचता वै औय फ्रपय बी
33% का राब प्राप्त कयता वै। ऱव ऱस्त ु ऩय रागत भल्यू ऴे फ्रकतने प्रततलत अतधक भूल्य अंफ्रकत कयता वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A book seller gives a 4% discount on the marked price and gives one book free during
vacation for buying every pack of 15 books of the same cost, and thus gains 35%. By what
percentage is the marked price higher than the cost price?
एक ऩुस्तक फ्रऱक्रे ता अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 4% की छू ट देता वै औय छु रिमों के दॊयान ऴभान क्रम भूल्य की 15 ऩुस्तकों
के प्रत्येक ऩैक कॉ खयीदन े ऩय एक ऩुस्तक भुफ्त देता वै, औय इऴ प्रकाय 35% का राब अजजित कयता वै। अंफ्रकत
भूल्य, क्रम भूल्य ऴ े फ्रकतन े प्रततलत अतधक वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A trader gives 15% discount on the marked price of an article and gives 2 articles free for
buying 16 articles and gains 36% in the entire transaction. Assuming a customer pays for
16 articles, the marked price of an article is what percentage more than its cost price?
एक व्याऩायी फ्रकऴी ऱस्तु के अंफ्रकत भूल्य ऩय 15% की छू ट देता वै औय 16 ऱस्तुएँ खयीदने ऩय 2 ऱस्तुएँ िी देता वै
तथा ऩूय े रेन-देन ऩय 36% का राब अजजित कयता वै। भान रीजजए फ्रक एक ग्रावक 16 ऱस्तओु ंके जरए बुगतान
कयता वै, तॉ ऱस्तु का अंफ्रकत भूल्य उऴके क्रम भूल्य ऴ े फ्रकतन े प्रततलत अतधक वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
What price should Kunal mark on a pair of pants which costs him ₹3,300, so as to gain 33%
after allowing a successive discount of 25% and 30%?
कु णार कॉ ₹3,300 क्रम भूल्य ऱारे ऩैंट ऩय फ्रकतना भूल्य अंफ्रकत कयना चारवए, ताफ्रक 25% औय 30% की
क्रजभक छू ट देन े के फाद बी उऴे 33% का राब प्राप्त वॉ?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A table has a marked price of Rs. 8,000. A shopkeeper purchased it at two successive
discounts of 20% and 25%. He sold the table for Rs. 8,000 after spending Rs. 300 on
transportation. Find his profit Percentage.
एक भेज का अंफ्रकत भूर्म Rs. 8,000 वै। एक दकु ानदाय इऴ े 20%औय 25% की दॉ क्रजभक छू टों ऩय खयीदता वै।
ऱव ऩरयऱवन ऩय Rs. 300 खचा कयन े के फाद भेज कॉ Rs. 8,000 भ ें फेच देता वै। उऴका राब प्रततलत ज्ञात कीजजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The list price of a washing machine is ₹13,200. It is sold to a retailer after two successive
discounts of 25% and 15%. The retailer wants to earn a profit of 20% on his cost after
allowing a 25% discount (on its new list price) to the customer. At what price should he list
the washing machine?
एक ऱॉजलिंग भलीन का ऴूची भूल्य ₹13,200 वै। इऴ े एक खुदया फ्रऱक्रे ता कॉ 25% औय 15% की दॉ क्रजभक छू ट देकय
फेचा जाता वै। खुदया फ्रऱक्रे ता ग्रावक कॉ (इऴके नए ऴूची भूल्य ऩय) 25% की छू ट देन े के फाद अऩन े क्रम भूल्य ऩय
20% का राब अजजित कयना चावता वै। उऴ े ऱॉजलिंग भलीन का ऴूची भूल्य फ्रकतना यखना चारवए?
Group D 05/09/2022 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A store offers a 'Buy 2 Get 1 Free' scheme on the sale of shirts. Each shirt is priced at ₹1,600.
Additionally, the store gives a 10% cash discount on the total bill amount. If Tamanna
wants to buy 6 shirts, how much will she actually pay (in ₹) after the discounts?
एक स्टॉय, लटा की फ्रफक्री ऩय '2 खयीदें 1 भुफ़्त ऩाएँ' स्कीभ दे यवा वै। प्रत्येक लटा की कीभत ₹1,600 वै। इऴके
अततरयि, स्टॉय कु र फ्रफर याजल ऩय 10% नकद छू ट बी देता वै। मदद तभन्ना 6 लटा खयीदना चावती वै, तॉ छू ट के
फाद उऴ े ऱास्तऱ भ ें फ्रकतनी याजल (₹ भ)ें का बुगतान कयना वॉगा?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The cost price of 12 oranges is equal to the selling price of 9 oranges and the discount on
10 oranges is equal to the profit on 5 oranges. What is the percentage of discount (correct
up to 2 decimal places)?
12 ऴंतय ेका क्रम भूल्य 9 ऴंतय े के फ्रऱक्रम भूल्य के फयाफय वै औय 10 ऴंतय ेऩय छू ट 5 ऴंतय ेऩय राब के फयाफय वै. छू ट
का प्रततलत क्या वै (2 दलभरऱ स्थानों तक ऴवी)?
RRB NTPC 23/07/2021 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A dealer buys two articles X and Y for ₹4,000 each. He marks each of them at the same
price. He sells X by giving two successive discounts of 63% and 34% and still earns ₹810 as
profit. If he sells Y at a single discount of 67%, then what is the profit percentage on Y?
एक िीरय दॉ ऱस्तुएं X औय Y भ ें ऴ े प्रत्येक ऱस्तु ₹4,000 दय ऴ े खयीदता वै। ऱव उनभ ें ऴ े प्रत्येक ऩय ऴभान भूल्य
अंफ्रकत कयता वै। ऱव X कॉ 63% औय 34% की दॉ क्रभागत छू ट देकय फेचता वै औय फ्रपय बी ₹810 का राब अजजित
कयता वै। मदद ऱव Y कॉ 67% की एकर छू ट ऩय फेचता वै, तॉ Y ऩय राब प्रततलत फ्रकतना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The cost price (including making charges) of a necklace is ₹2,50,000, and Amit wants to
make 15% profit by selling it. At the time of the sale, he declares a discount of 5% on the
making charges of the necklace. If making charges are ₹20,000, what is the marked price
of the necklace?
एक वाय का क्रम भूल्य (जनभााण लुल्क ऴरवत) ₹2,50,000 वै, औय अजभत इऴ े फेचकय 15% राब कभाना चावता
वै। फ्रफक्री के ऴभम, ऱव वाय के जनभााण लुल्क ऩय 5% छू ट की घॉळणा कयता वै। मदद जनभााण लुल्क ₹20,000 वै, तॉ
वाय का अंफ्रकत भूल्य ज्ञात कीजजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].
